# HPD.ML.Transforms.MinMaxNormalizeTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Scales column values to [scaleMin, scaleMax] range. Formula: (value - dataMin) / (dataMax - dataMin) * (scaleMax - scaleMin) + scaleMin

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class MinMaxNormalizeTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```

